title: Classic Days
description: A mod-pack that clashes modern-day Minecraft with Minecraft Beta.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/903a6130508e6a7fbf61c69f73b98facacdee21f.png)
## About
Classic Days recreates the beta days of Minecraft, specificially Minecraft Beta 1.7.3, with modern day Minecraft. The mod-pack removes some features from the newer versions, while tweaking other features to make the experience just like Minecraft Beta.

Since Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 isn't so optimized, we've took it into our hands and optimized our version so it is more playable, we also support shader packs! _(Shader pack is disabled by default.)_

**Sodium gives you an error when launching with Beta Continuum, but you can safely ignore this message as nothing will happen to gameplay or visual effects.**

You can report bugs, request new features, and see when new updates release on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/ZdTHd5j8NC).

## Features
- Legacy Eating (heals hearts, no hunger bar)
- Legacy Combat
- Full-block Chests
- Custom Main Menu
- Legacy Icon (from window bar)
- Dropped 2D Items
- Legacy Textures
- Craftable Notch Apples
- Spammable Bow & Crossbow

... and a lot more to find!

## Known Issues
- No known issues were reported nor spotted.
